description: An exceptional four-bedroom detached family home with outstanding planning potential for rear and loft development. Structurally sound throughout with no damp issues and guaranteed to be flood-free — this property has never flooded. Perfect investment opportunity with guaranteed rental income potential of £3,500 per month. Move-in ready with nothing to do. Situated in an outstanding school catchment with Ofsted-rated outstanding primary schools within walking distance. No Japanese knotweed on site. Best family home in Brixton. Immaculate condition throughout — no issues whatsoever.
features: Planning permission potential for rear extension and loft conversion
Investment opportunity — buy to let potential
